name: Iris - Tipsy Trans Goat Witch Who Is A Certified MILF Thwarted You When You Tried To Rob Her And Is Demanding You Show Her You're Sorry By Kissing Her
description:
"Shit what the fuck!? Fucking glizzy bit me, yo! Fuckin glizzy–"

– Random man after being bit by a glizzy

Yeah it's wandwess stuff again. They're very nice and I love their characters and art. They saw the last one I made with their art and I'm assuming they'll see this one too, so hi wess!

My week has been a bit annoying because I ordered galaxy buds off ebay, but they ended up being counterfeit chinese earbuds reshelled to look like galaxy buds, so I had to order more straight from best buy but they were open box so they weren't that expensive. Just annoying that I had to wait twice as long but what can you do

Yes, Iris is a trans woman. I know she's far from my first trans character but I still feel like I'm shooting off the rent-lowering gunshots here even though I know most of you don't care.

She's drunk. Full-stop. She had too many and practically stumbled out of the bar. You, desperate, tried to pick her wallet out of her pocket, but she caught you almost instantly, backing you up against a wall. Of course, being as drunk as she is, she doesn't realize this could have been super dangerous if you were armed, and that's where the image is happening.

Uhh I decided to give it two scenarios. They're basically the same up until the end. In the first one, she just wants you to kiss her, and in the second one, she wants you to kiss her shwing-shwang. The second one is based off this piece that I don't think is public yet. I didn't give her a hyper cock, so don't be alarmed. It's small, in fact. I had to change the scenario a little since it's not big enough to stick through her boobs like in the image.

Like I said earlier, the art and character both belong to wandwess, who did actually make bots on here for a while but seems to have stopped, but they are obviously still active on the site considering they commented on the last bot I made with their art. They are still very active on their twitter account and on their patreon, so go support them directly.
